docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS EDWARD

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS EDWARD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,519.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
